description: Style NoteThis vintage style nike Sweet Classic Leather shoe is a perfect fusion of street fashion and tennis glam. Designed for the tennis lover but crafted to look great on everybody these shoes blend function and fashion effortlessly, to make you look fabulous on and off the court.Product DetailsSynthetic leather upper with Nike swoosh overlays on the midfoot Mildly padded collar with an embroidered logo on the backLacing system for a snug, cutomised Fit and a padded tongue for comfortSynthetic leather and mesh fabric lining for comfort and breathabilityEVA midsole for advanced cushioningHerringbone grooves on the durable outsole for enhanced grip and tractionLeaf patterened herringbone grooves on the forefoot for better grip during toe offMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
